home.excellenceDesc1: Ull Yasan is synonymous with quality and prestige in the export of Patagonian seafood. Harvested from the cold, pristine waters of the South Atlantic (FAO 41), our products comply with the most stringent international food safety and quality controls.
home.excellenceDesc2: From our fully certified processing facilities and strategic berths in Puerto Madryn, Chubut, we export to Europe, North America, and Asia under HACCP guidelines and FDA regulations, ensuring unparalleled freshness in every batch.
home.ctaTitle: Take Your Business to the Next Level
home.ctaSubtitle: Get in touch with our export sales team to request a customized volume quote. We supply premium importers, B2B distributors, and high-end restaurant chains globally.

footer.tagline: Patagonian quality, freshness, and trust served to the world's most demanding markets.

aboutUsPage.title: About Us
aboutUsPage.subtitle: Connecting the Purity of the South Atlantic with Global Operational Excellence
aboutUsPage.historyText1: Established in the strategic ports of Argentine Patagonia, Ull Yasan was founded with a clear vision: to bring the purest, most exclusive marine resources of the South Atlantic (FAO 41) to the world's most demanding international markets.
aboutUsPage.historyText2: Over the years, we have grown by blending traditional maritime expertise with continuous investments in advanced sea-freezing vessels and internationally accredited land-based processing facilities, positioning ourselves as a trusted B2B partner worldwide.
aboutUsPage.missionText: To supply wild-caught seafood of the highest organoleptic quality through sustainable harvesting and an uninterrupted cold chain, flexibly serving the operational needs of premium importers, distributors, and culinary chains across Europe, North America, and Asia.
aboutUsPage.visionText: To lead the Patagonian seafood export industry as a global benchmark for commercial integrity, absolute traceability, and deep respect for marine sustainability.
aboutUsPage.valueSustainabilityDesc: We strictly adhere to official catch quotas and seasonal fishing bans, using selective gear that protects the marine ecosystem.
aboutUsPage.valueQualityDesc: Processed and frozen-at-sea immediately. All our vessels and processing plants operate under strict HACCP guidelines and FDA regulations.
aboutUsPage.valueTraceabilityDesc: We document the journey of every batch from the exact GPS harvest coordinates in the deep sea, through offloading docks, to the final destination port.
aboutUsPage.valuePartnershipDesc: Custom logistics plans featuring continuous cold chain monitoring, efficient cargo handling, and dedicated corporate customs support.
aboutUsPage.infrastructureText: Operating out of Puerto Madryn, Chubut, we have direct access to deep-water cold storage container terminals. Our modern fleet and shore-based processing plants allow us to respond efficiently to both urgent air-freighted fresh shipments and volume B2B ocean container shipments.
